name: [YAOC2] Policy Gateway
_fix: Fixed Load Policy Set missing queryParameters ($1 binding). Added 'whatsapp' to VALID_CHANNELS. Wired capability guard before Telegram approval. Sandbox lookup now uses workflow IDs not names.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'error', message: 'Schema validation failed', errors: $json._gateway.errors }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT id, name, version, defaults, rules FROM yaoc2.policy_sets WHERE name = $1 LIMIT 1

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $('Evaluate Policy').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, _gateway: { ...item._gateway, deny_reason: `Action denied by policy rule: ${item._gateway.matched_rule}` } } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'denied', proposed_action_id: $('Build Deny Response').first().json.id, message: $('Build Deny Response').first().json._gateway.deny_reason }) }}

parameters.text:
={{ '🔐 *Approval Required*

*Action:* ' + $json.action.name + '
*Target:* ' + $json.action.target_system + '
*Risk:* ' + $json.risk.level + '
*Requested by:* ' + ($json.requester.display_name ?? $json.requester.user_id) + '
*Intent:* ' + $json.intent.title + '
*Channel:* ' + $json.requester.channel + '

*Proposed Action ID:* `' + $json.id + '`

Reply with the ID above followed by APPROVE or DENY.' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'pending-approval', proposed_action_id: $('Approval Guard').first().json.id, message: 'Action requires approval. Analyst has been notified via Telegram.' }) }}
